model_artifact_version_note: model.py adjusted to require 127 daily bars before emitting 126-day momentum signals; prior CSV smoke latest is superseded/stale.

qfa.command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/.venv/bin/qfa backtest run models/tsmom-voltarget-liquid-etf-weekly-v1/model.py --symbols SPY,QQQ,IWM,TLT,GLD,SLV,USO,FXE,FXY --start 2024-01-01 --end 2025-12-31 --db models/tsmom-voltarget-liquid-etf-weekly-v1/evaluations/qfa-real.sqlite3
qfa.data_source: Alpaca market data via qfa AlpacaGateway; no --data-csv used
qfa.db_retention_note: SQLite DB artifact removed before commit per alpha-model-management large artifact policy; compact JSON/Markdown summaries retained.

data.price_adjustment_note: qfa uses the repository AlpacaGateway stock bars request; no explicit adjusted-price flag is exposed in this repo version.

costs_slippage.note: Repository qfa backtester currently has no transaction-cost/slippage/turnover arguments or calculations, so metrics are pre-cost.

random_period_protocol.reason: Task required at least one real-data qfa backtest; qfa CLI currently supports single requested windows but not built-in random-period protocol. Recommended child/refinement should implement scripted random windows and cost haircuts.

orthogonality_checks.reason: No accepted/watchlist alpha library return streams were present in this model folder or qfa artifacts for comparison.

stale_prior_results.reason: CSV fixture smoke test; superseded by Alpaca real-data evaluation and not alpha evidence.
Previous latest.json summarized the CSV fixture smoke test and has been overwritten by real-data results.

warnings: Metrics are pre-cost because qfa lacks transaction-cost/slippage support in this repository version.
qfa rebalances/evaluates daily; the weekly model name is conceptual and not enforced by the current qfa backtester API.
No random-period protocol or orthogonality check was completed in this pass.
No trades were placed and no daemon was run.
This is research output, not investment advice.
refinement_child_idea: AR-003-R1: implement scripted random-window validation plus 5 bps turnover-based cost haircut and compare 63/126/252 lookbacks with 20/60 vol windows on the same ETF universe.
divergent_child_idea: AR-003-D1: test cross-sectional ETF relative-strength/defensive-rotation model using macro/liquidity proxies instead of pure time-series momentum.
